TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Gadu, title = Gadu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gadu} }

S.FORM: = Gadu = Gaga mniq Taytung Cinfungsyang ka alang Gadu. 65 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 208 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 95% niqan 198 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 5% niqan 10 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga. Pusu nniqan alang Wana bi hini ka alang Paywan. Nniqan alang Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cing-fung alang Sin-sing. Gasuc Ti-ri lnglingay Dgiyaq. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung ‚óŹPeapa sapah skaya: Dhuq nniqan sngayan sapah skaya Tay-tung do tucing, tduwa mgaaw: (1)embarux rulu(Niqan embarux rulu nniqan ka dalih nniqan sngayan sapah skaya‚Üíquri hunac mudu C-pen(saw hari 15 minute‚ÜíTay-ma-ri(saw hari 15 minute‚ÜíSin-sing(Sa-pu-yo)(saw hari 5 minute)„ÄąTung 64 syeyn„ÄČ (2)Peapa basu Ting-tung(Gaga narac nniqan sngayan sapah skaya ‚Üímnuda C-pen‚Üísngayan basu rulu Tay-ma-ri tucing rulu(saw hari 50 minute‚Üíkndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu(saw hari 5 minuteÔĻě ‚óŹPeapa rulu qrngul: (1)Quri daya na rulu qrngul: Taypey‚ÜíBgurah sngayan rulu qrngul Tay-tung(saw hari 7 hr‚Üípeapu quri hunac na rulu qrngul‚ÜíMniq nniqan sngayan rulu Tay-ma-ri hiya tucing rulu(saw hari 25 minute‚Üíkndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu hiya pseapa rulu(saw hari 5 minute uxay uri o priyux peapa basu Ting-tung(Gaga narac nniqan sngayan sapah skaya ‚Üímnuda C-pen‚Üísngayan basu rulu Tay-ma-ri tucing rulu(saw hari 50 minute‚Üíkndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu(saw hari 5 minuteÔĻě. (2)Quri hunac na rulu qrngul: Quri hunac na elug rulu qrngul: Kaw-syung‚Üímniq nniqan sngayan rulu hiya tucing(saw hari 3hr‚Üí kndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu psapa rulu(saw hari 5 minuteÔĻě. ‚óŹPeapa basu: Paru alang Tay-tung: Peapa basu Ting-tung uxay uri o basu Kwo-kwang‚Üímnuda C-pen‚Üísngayan basu rulu Tay-ma-ri tucing rulu(saw hari 50 minute‚Üíkndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu psapa rulu(saw hari 5 minuteÔĻě. ‚óŹMgrig su na rulu: (1)Taypey:Nan 2 kaw kwo-taw 3 haw uxay uri o 1 haw ‚ÜíTay-cung(saw hari 3 hrÔĻě‚Üíkaw-syung(saw hari 2 hrÔĻě‚Üímniq Nan-coaw cyaw-ryo-taw tucing rulu(saw hari 1 hrÔĻě‚Üílutuc Tay1 syeyn dhuq Fung-kang(saw hari 1 hrÔĻě‚ÜíNan-hwey kung-ru„Äątay 9 syeyn„ÄČTa-wu(saw hari 30minuteÔĻě‚ÜíTay-ma-ri(saw hari 40 minuteÔĻě‚ÜíSin-sing(Sa-pu-yo)(saw hari 5minute )„ÄąTung 64 syeyn„ÄČ. (2)Taypey:Ping-hay kung-ru‚ÜíSu-aw(saw hari 2 hr)‚ÜíSu-hwa kung-ru Hwa-reyeyn(saw hari 2 hr)‚ÜíTay 9 syeyn Tay-tung(saw hari 2 hr)‚ÜíC-pen(saw hari 15 minute)‚ÜíTay-ma-ri(saw hari 15 minute )‚ÜíSin-sing(Sa-pu-yo)(saw hari 5 minute)„ÄąTung 64 syeyn„ÄČ. Pusu klgan seejiq alang Paywan. Djiyun kari Kari Paywan ni Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni teyeynskiyo. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw ‚óŹSaan rmigaw:Ddgiyaq, ayug, qhjing. ‚óŹSaan mkan uuqun sapah Jen-jen-man: (089)782830 Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cin-fung alang Sin-sing 5 rin 84-7 haw. ‚óŹYi-yuan san-cwang: 089-782-533 0928-350-314 Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cin-fung alang Sin-sing 3 rin 50 haw. ‚óŹSapah saan tqian Ya-ke: 089-780-560 0911-616-676 Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cin-fung alang Sin-sing 2 rin 19 haw. ‚óŹSapah saan tqian Cin-hwang: Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cin-fung alang Sin-sing 1 rin 9 haw. 089-780-067,089-782-830,0938-891-550 Pnyahan alang Gaga mniq daya Tay-ma-ri ka alang nii, siyaw hraan hidaw o Tay-ping-yang, gqiyan hidaw o dalih ddgiyaq C-pen, hunac o dalih alang Ta-wang, daya ni Pey-ri se-cyu daya Pey-ri yayung ka ayus dha, alang hangan nii seuxal o bukuy kwang-fu ka Taywan do kika kmpriyux hangan"Ru-pa-qa-te ", hangan Tlu o"alang Sin-sing".
S.PHON: = gadu = gaga mniq tajtuŇč ¶in*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč gadu. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga. pusu nniqan alaŇč wana bi ńßini ka alaŇč pajwan. nniqan alaŇč njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶iŇč-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč. gasu ¶ ti-…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj dgijaq. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč *p…ôapa sapańß skaja: dńßuq nniqan sŇčajan sapańß skaja taj-tuŇč do tu ¶iŇč, tduwa mgaaw: (*)…ômba…ĺux …ĺulu(niqan …ômba…ĺux …ĺulu nniqan ka dalińß nniqan sŇčajan sapańß skaja*qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ mudu ¶-p…ôn(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*taj-ma-…ĺi(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*sin-siŇč(sa-pu-jo)(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô)*tuŇč ** sj…ôn* (*)p…ôapa basu tiŇč-tuŇč(gaga na…ĺa ¶ nniqan sŇčajan sapańß skaja *mnuda ¶-p…ôn*sŇčajan basu …ĺulu taj-ma-…ĺi tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô* *p…ôapa …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul: (*)qu…ĺi daja na …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul: tajp…ô*bgu…ĺańß sŇčajan …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul taj-tuŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ*p…ôapu qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ na …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul*mniq nniqan sŇčajan …ĺulu taj-ma-…ĺi ńßija tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu ńßija ps…ôapa …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô uxaj u…ĺi o p…ĺijux p…ôapa basu tiŇč-tuŇč(gaga na…ĺa ¶ nniqan sŇčajan sapańß skaja *mnuda ¶-p…ôn*sŇčajan basu …ĺulu taj-ma-…ĺi tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô*. (*)qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ na …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul: qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ na …ôlug …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul: kaw-sjuŇč*mniq nniqan sŇčajan …ĺulu ńßija tu ¶iŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi *ńß…ĺ* kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu psapa …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô*. *p…ôapa basu: pa…ĺu alaŇč taj-tuŇč: p…ôapa basu tiŇč-tuŇč uxaj u…ĺi o basu kwo-kwaŇč*mnuda ¶-p…ôn*sŇčajan basu …ĺulu taj-ma-…ĺi tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu psapa …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô*. *mg…ĺig su na …ĺulu: (*)tajp…ô:nan * kaw kwo-taw * ńßaw uxaj u…ĺi o * ńßaw *taj- ¶uŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ**kaw-sjuŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ**mniq nan- ¶oaw ¶jaw-…ĺjo-taw tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ**lutu ¶ taj* sj…ôn dńßuq *uŇč-kaŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ**nan-ńßw…ô kuŇč-…ĺu*taj * sj…ôn*ta-wu(saw ńßa…ĺi **minut…ô**taj-ma-…ĺi(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô**sin-siŇč(sa-pu-jo)(saw ńßa…ĺi *minut…ô )*tuŇč ** sj…ôn*. (*)tajp…ô:piŇč-ńßaj kuŇč-…ĺu*su-aw(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ)*su-ńßwa kuŇč-…ĺu ńßwa-…ĺ…ô…ôn(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ)*taj * sj…ôn taj-tuŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ)* ¶-p…ôn(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô)*taj-ma-…ĺi(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô )*sin-siŇč(sa-pu-jo)(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô)*tuŇč ** sj…ôn*. pusu klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč pajwan. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi pajwan ni tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ônskijo. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw *saan …ĺmigaw:ddgijaq, ajug, qńß…üiŇč. *saan mkan uuqun sapańß …ü…ôn-…ü…ôn-man: (***)****** njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶in-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč * …ĺin **-* ńßaw. *ji-juan san- ¶waŇč: ***-***-*** ****-***-*** njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶in-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč * …ĺin ** ńßaw. *sapańß saan tqian ja-k…ô: ***-***-*** ****-***-*** njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶in-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč * …ĺin ** ńßaw. *sapańß saan tqian ¶in-ńßwaŇč: njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶in-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč * …ĺin * ńßaw. ***-***-***,***-***-***,****-***-*** pnjańßan alaŇč gaga mniq daja taj-ma-…ĺi ka alaŇč nii, sijaw ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o taj-piŇč-jaŇč, gqijan ńßidaw o dalińß ddgijaq ¶-p…ôn, ńßuna ¶ o dalińß alaŇč ta-waŇč, daja ni p…ô-…ĺi s…ô- ¶ju daja p…ô-…ĺi jajuŇč ka ajus dńßa, alaŇč ńßaŇčan nii s…ôuxal o bukuj kwaŇč-*u ka tajwan do kika kmp…ĺijux ńßaŇčan"…ĺu-pa-qa-t…ô ", ńßaŇčan tlu o"alaŇč sin-siŇč".
S.FORM: = Gadu = Gaga mniq Taytung Cinfungsyang ka alang Gadu. 65 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 208 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 95% niqan 198 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 5% niqan 10 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga. Pusu nniqan alang Wana bi hini ka alang Paywan. Nniqan alang Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cing-fung alang Sin-sing. Gasuc Ti-ri lnglingay Dgiyaq. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung ‚óŹPeapa sapah skaya: Dhuq nniqan sngayan sapah skaya Tay-tung do tucing, tduwa mgaaw: (1)embarux rulu(Niqan embarux rulu nniqan ka dalih nniqan sngayan sapah skaya‚Üíquri hunac mudu C-pen(saw hari 15 minute‚ÜíTay-ma-ri(saw hari 15 minute‚ÜíSin-sing(Sa-pu-yo)(saw hari 5 minute)„ÄąTung 64 syeyn„ÄČ (2)Peapa basu Ting-tung(Gaga narac nniqan sngayan sapah skaya ‚Üímnuda C-pen‚Üísngayan basu rulu Tay-ma-ri tucing rulu(saw hari 50 minute‚Üíkndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu(saw hari 5 minuteÔĻě ‚óŹPeapa rulu qrngul: (1)Quri daya na rulu qrngul: Taypey‚ÜíBgurah sngayan rulu qrngul Tay-tung(saw hari 7 hr‚Üípeapu quri hunac na rulu qrngul‚ÜíMniq nniqan sngayan rulu Tay-ma-ri hiya tucing rulu(saw hari 25 minute‚Üíkndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu hiya pseapa rulu(saw hari 5 minute uxay uri o priyux peapa basu Ting-tung(Gaga narac nniqan sngayan sapah skaya ‚Üímnuda C-pen‚Üísngayan basu rulu Tay-ma-ri tucing rulu(saw hari 50 minute‚Üíkndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu(saw hari 5 minuteÔĻě. (2)Quri hunac na rulu qrngul: Quri hunac na elug rulu qrngul: Kaw-syung‚Üímniq nniqan sngayan rulu hiya tucing(saw hari 3hr‚Üí kndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu psapa rulu(saw hari 5 minuteÔĻě. ‚óŹPeapa basu: Paru alang Tay-tung: Peapa basu Ting-tung uxay uri o basu Kwo-kwang‚Üímnuda C-pen‚Üísngayan basu rulu Tay-ma-ri tucing rulu(saw hari 50 minute‚Üíkndadax pusu muda qpahan alang (Se-cyu fa-cang siyuey-hwe) na rulu psapa rulu(saw hari 5 minuteÔĻě. ‚óŹMgrig su na rulu: (1)Taypey:Nan 2 kaw kwo-taw 3 haw uxay uri o 1 haw ‚ÜíTay-cung(saw hari 3 hrÔĻě‚Üíkaw-syung(saw hari 2 hrÔĻě‚Üímniq Nan-coaw cyaw-ryo-taw tucing rulu(saw hari 1 hrÔĻě‚Üílutuc Tay1 syeyn dhuq Fung-kang(saw hari 1 hrÔĻě‚ÜíNan-hwey kung-ru„Äątay 9 syeyn„ÄČTa-wu(saw hari 30minuteÔĻě‚ÜíTay-ma-ri(saw hari 40 minuteÔĻě‚ÜíSin-sing(Sa-pu-yo)(saw hari 5minute )„ÄąTung 64 syeyn„ÄČ. (2)Taypey:Ping-hay kung-ru‚ÜíSu-aw(saw hari 2 hr)‚ÜíSu-hwa kung-ru Hwa-reyeyn(saw hari 2 hr)‚ÜíTay 9 syeyn Tay-tung(saw hari 2 hr)‚ÜíC-pen(saw hari 15 minute)‚ÜíTay-ma-ri(saw hari 15 minute )‚ÜíSin-sing(Sa-pu-yo)(saw hari 5 minute)„ÄąTung 64 syeyn„ÄČ. Pusu klgan seejiq alang Paywan. Djiyun kari Kari Paywan ni Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni teyeynskiyo. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw ‚óŹSaan rmigaw:Ddgiyaq, ayug, qhjing. ‚óŹSaan mkan uuqun sapah Jen-jen-man: (089)782830 Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cin-fung alang Sin-sing 5 rin 84-7 haw. ‚óŹYi-yuan san-cwang: 089-782-533 0928-350-314 Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cin-fung alang Sin-sing 3 rin 50 haw. ‚óŹSapah saan tqian Ya-ke: 089-780-560 0911-616-676 Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cin-fung alang Sin-sing 2 rin 19 haw. ‚óŹSapah saan tqian Cin-hwang: Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Cin-fung alang Sin-sing 1 rin 9 haw. 089-780-067,089-782-830,0938-891-550 Pnyahan alang Gaga mniq daya Tay-ma-ri ka alang nii, siyaw hraan hidaw o Tay-ping-yang, gqiyan hidaw o dalih ddgiyaq C-pen, hunac o dalih alang Ta-wang, daya ni Pey-ri se-cyu daya Pey-ri yayung ka ayus dha, alang hangan nii seuxal o bukuy kwang-fu ka Taywan do kika kmpriyux hangan"Ru-pa-qa-te ", hangan Tlu o"alang Sin-sing".
S.PHON: = gadu = gaga mniq tajtuŇč ¶in*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč gadu. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga. pusu nniqan alaŇč wana bi ńßini ka alaŇč pajwan. nniqan alaŇč njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶iŇč-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč. gasu ¶ ti-…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj dgijaq. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč *p…ôapa sapańß skaja: dńßuq nniqan sŇčajan sapańß skaja taj-tuŇč do tu ¶iŇč, tduwa mgaaw: (*)…ômba…ĺux …ĺulu(niqan …ômba…ĺux …ĺulu nniqan ka dalińß nniqan sŇčajan sapańß skaja*qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ mudu ¶-p…ôn(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*taj-ma-…ĺi(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*sin-siŇč(sa-pu-jo)(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô)*tuŇč ** sj…ôn* (*)p…ôapa basu tiŇč-tuŇč(gaga na…ĺa ¶ nniqan sŇčajan sapańß skaja *mnuda ¶-p…ôn*sŇčajan basu …ĺulu taj-ma-…ĺi tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô* *p…ôapa …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul: (*)qu…ĺi daja na …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul: tajp…ô*bgu…ĺańß sŇčajan …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul taj-tuŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ*p…ôapu qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ na …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul*mniq nniqan sŇčajan …ĺulu taj-ma-…ĺi ńßija tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu ńßija ps…ôapa …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô uxaj u…ĺi o p…ĺijux p…ôapa basu tiŇč-tuŇč(gaga na…ĺa ¶ nniqan sŇčajan sapańß skaja *mnuda ¶-p…ôn*sŇčajan basu …ĺulu taj-ma-…ĺi tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô*. (*)qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ na …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul: qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ na …ôlug …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul: kaw-sjuŇč*mniq nniqan sŇčajan …ĺulu ńßija tu ¶iŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi *ńß…ĺ* kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu psapa …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô*. *p…ôapa basu: pa…ĺu alaŇč taj-tuŇč: p…ôapa basu tiŇč-tuŇč uxaj u…ĺi o basu kwo-kwaŇč*mnuda ¶-p…ôn*sŇčajan basu …ĺulu taj-ma-…ĺi tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô*kndadax pusu muda qpańßan alaŇč (s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč siju…ô-ńßw…ô) na …ĺulu psapa …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô*. *mg…ĺig su na …ĺulu: (*)tajp…ô:nan * kaw kwo-taw * ńßaw uxaj u…ĺi o * ńßaw *taj- ¶uŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ**kaw-sjuŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ**mniq nan- ¶oaw ¶jaw-…ĺjo-taw tu ¶iŇč …ĺulu(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ**lutu ¶ taj* sj…ôn dńßuq *uŇč-kaŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ**nan-ńßw…ô kuŇč-…ĺu*taj * sj…ôn*ta-wu(saw ńßa…ĺi **minut…ô**taj-ma-…ĺi(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô**sin-siŇč(sa-pu-jo)(saw ńßa…ĺi *minut…ô )*tuŇč ** sj…ôn*. (*)tajp…ô:piŇč-ńßaj kuŇč-…ĺu*su-aw(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ)*su-ńßwa kuŇč-…ĺu ńßwa-…ĺ…ô…ôn(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ)*taj * sj…ôn taj-tuŇč(saw ńßa…ĺi * ńß…ĺ)* ¶-p…ôn(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô)*taj-ma-…ĺi(saw ńßa…ĺi ** minut…ô )*sin-siŇč(sa-pu-jo)(saw ńßa…ĺi * minut…ô)*tuŇč ** sj…ôn*. pusu klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč pajwan. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi pajwan ni tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ônskijo. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw *saan …ĺmigaw:ddgijaq, ajug, qńß…üiŇč. *saan mkan uuqun sapańß …ü…ôn-…ü…ôn-man: (***)****** njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶in-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč * …ĺin **-* ńßaw. *ji-juan san- ¶waŇč: ***-***-*** ****-***-*** njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶in-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč * …ĺin ** ńßaw. *sapańß saan tqian ja-k…ô: ***-***-*** ****-***-*** njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶in-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč * …ĺin ** ńßaw. *sapańß saan tqian ¶in-ńßwaŇč: njusan taj-tuŇč nsgan ¶in-*uŇč alaŇč sin-siŇč * …ĺin * ńßaw. ***-***-***,***-***-***,****-***-*** pnjańßan alaŇč gaga mniq daja taj-ma-…ĺi ka alaŇč nii, sijaw ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o taj-piŇč-jaŇč, gqijan ńßidaw o dalińß ddgijaq ¶-p…ôn, ńßuna ¶ o dalińß alaŇč ta-waŇč, daja ni p…ô-…ĺi s…ô- ¶ju daja p…ô-…ĺi jajuŇč ka ajus dńßa, alaŇč ńßaŇčan nii s…ôuxal o bukuj kwaŇč-*u ka tajwan do kika kmp…ĺijux ńßaŇčan"…ĺu-pa-qa-t…ô ", ńßaŇčan tlu o"alaŇč sin-siŇč".
